title: Silver Trident
description: A resource pack that makes the trident silver
body:
This resource pack makes the trident silver, similar to the [BSD Daemon shown on the FreeBSD site](https://www.freebsd.org/images/beastie.png).

Features:

+ Changed trident item texture (used in inventory)
+ Changed trident texture when being held/thrown
+ Changed trident particles

You may also want to check out [my other similar resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/yellow-trident).
